seo_title: Google AI Search Shift: What It Means for Marketers
meta_description: Google's AI search shift means significant changes for marketers and founders. Learn what it means and how to adapt.
body_html:
Google has officially announced that AI-generated answers are now front and center in search, replacing traditional SEO methods.

Understand the Impact on Your BusinessMost brands have almost no visibility into how AI is describing them to their customersThis shift means significant changes for marketers and foundersYou need to adapt your strategy to stay aheadWhat Does This Mean for SEO?Key ChangesAI-generated answers are now prioritized in search resultsTraditional SEO methods may no longer be effectiveMarketers need to reassess their strategy to stay competitiveTake Action NowDon't wait for the dust to settle – start adapting your strategy today to stay ahead of the curve

source.title: Google just broke SEO. Here’s what replaces it.
source.summary: Google has announced that AI-generated answers will be prioritized in search results, potentially disrupting traditional SEO strategies. This shift means that many brands may have limited visibility into how their content is being described to customers by AI algorithms. The change marks a significant shift in the way Google approaches search and user experience.
